title: Windmannia samoensis
taxonomy: Windmannia samoensis is classified within the family Hymenophyllaceae, which is a family of ferns commonly known as air plants or resurrection ferns. This family comprises approximately 800 species of epiphytic ferns found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world. Hymenophyllaceae is part of the larger group Hymenophytina, a clade that includes several families of ferns. The classification of Windmannia samoensis within this family reflects its unique characteristics and growth habits as an epiphytic fern. As a member of Hymenophyllaceae, Windmannia samoensis is known for its delicate fronds and ability to thrive in environments with limited water availability.
